tasks.subject: Task 1: Pure substrate (core/reaper.py) — Verdict, Policy, classify, partition
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the pure decision-tree module that every future heartbeat-aware consumer (this layer's CLI, Layer W daemon, Layer Y orchestrator hook) will reuse.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py`
- Test: `tests/core/test_reaper.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Verdict is a str-backed Enum with seven values in insertion order: LIVE, IDLE_REAP, ORPHAN_REAP, OVERAGE_REAP, STALE_LEDGER, HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN, UNROUTABLE.
- Policy is a frozen dataclass with one field act_verdicts: frozenset[Verdict].
- DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY.act_verdicts == frozenset({IDLE_REAP, OVERAGE_REAP, STALE_LEDGER}).
- DEFAULT_STRICT_VERDICTS == frozenset({UNROUTABLE, HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN}).
- policy_from_cli_flags(apply=False, ...) returns Policy(frozenset()).
- _resolve(entry, 'idle_timeout_s', 7200.0) returns entry value cast to float, falls back on missing / None / non-numeric.
- classify implements row-1-through-row-7 decision tree (spec §3.3); UNROUTABLE never returned by classify.
- partition splits verdicts by Policy.act_verdicts.
- Module imports zero I/O modules / no kinoforge.{providers,sources,engines,stores,cli}.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper.py -v` → 25 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py", "tests/core/test_reaper.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Verdict enum 7 values stable order", "Policy frozen dataclass", "DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY correct", "policy_from_cli_flags dry-run empty", "_resolve type-safe fallback", "classify row 1-7", "partition splits by policy", "module is pure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Invariant scan — core/reaper.py purity contract
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock the purity contract architecturally so a future contributor cannot accidentally drag I/O into the pure module.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/test_core_invariant.py` (append one new test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New test test_core_reaper_module_is_pure asserts src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py contains no import of urllib, subprocess, threading, time, pathlib, kinoforge.providers, kinoforge.sources, kinoforge.engines, kinoforge.stores, kinoforge.cli, or kinoforge.core.lifecycle.
- Test fails when run against hypothetical reaper.py with `import urllib.request` injected.
- Existing 6 invariant tests still pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_core_invariant.py -v` → 7 PASS.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_core_invariant.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_core_invariant.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scan rejects forbidden imports", "scan fails on injected urllib", "existing 6 tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Lifecycle.grace_after_session_s field + config wire
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the single new YAML knob lifecycle.grace_after_session_s and propagate through Lifecycle dataclass + LifecycleConfig pydantic + Config.lifecycle().

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py` (Lifecycle dataclass at line ~71)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py` (LifecycleConfig at ~101, validator below ~131, Config.lifecycle() at ~719)
- Modify: `tests/core/test_lifecycle.py` (+2 tests)
- Modify: `tests/core/test_config.py` (+3 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Lifecycle() defaults grace_after_session_s == 300.0.
- Lifecycle(grace_after_session_s=42.0) round-trips.
- LifecycleConfig(budget=1.0) defaults grace_after_session_s to 300.0.
- LifecycleConfig round-trips through model_dump_json/model_validate_json.
- LifecycleConfig with grace_after_session_s=-5.0 raises ValidationError.
- Config.lifecycle() populates grace_after_session_s from YAML.
- All existing config + lifecycle tests pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_lifecycle.py tests/core/test_config.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_lifecycle.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_lifecycle.py tests/core/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Lifecycle default 300", "round-trips", "LifecycleConfig default 300", "model_dump round-trip", "negative rejected", "Config.lifecycle wires field"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Impure substrate (core/reaper_actor.py) — act_on_verdict + provider_for
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the side-effecting layer. Re-classify-before-act + Layer 18 per-instance lock + provider routing.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py`
- Test: `tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ActionResult frozen dataclass: instance_id, snapshot_verdict, applied_verdict, action, reason.
- provider_for caches by provider name — two entries with same provider = one factory call.
- provider_for returns None + caches None on factory exception (UnknownAdapter, AuthError, generic).
- act_on_verdict acquires store.acquire_lock(f'reaper/{id}', ttl_s=30.0) before any provider call.
- act_on_verdict re-classifies inside lock; drift → ActionResult(action='skipped').
- IDLE_REAP / OVERAGE_REAP / ORPHAN_REAP confirmed → destroy_confirmed + ledger.forget.
- STALE_LEDGER → only forget.
- UNROUTABLE → only forget.
- LIVE / HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN → action='no_op'.
- TeardownError caught locally → action='failed'; never propagates.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py -v` → 12 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ActionResult shape", "provider_for caches", "provider_for returns None on exception", "act_on_verdict acquires lock", "drift skips destruction", "verdict dispatch", "TeardownError caught"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: sweep orchestration with caches
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the call-scoped, multi-provider sweep that consumes T1 (classify/partition) + T4 (provider_for/act_on_verdict) and produces SweepReport. Cache provider.list_instances() per provider name.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py` (append `sweep` function)
- Test: `tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py` (new file, 6 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Empty ledger → SweepReport(snapshot={}, actions=[]).
- Two entries same provider → one list_instances() call.
- Provider whose list_instances() raises → all its entries become UNROUTABLE; other providers unaffected.
- policy=None → actions=[] even with destroyable verdicts in snapshot.
- policy=DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY → IDLE_REAP/OVERAGE_REAP/STALE_LEDGER acted; others not.
- One action='failed' does NOT prevent next entry from being acted on.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py -v` → 6 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["empty ledger empty report", "list_instances cached", "failure demotes provider to UNROUTABLE", "policy=None no actions", "DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY routes correctly", "failure isolation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: kinoforge reap CLI rewrite + flags + formatters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace _cmd_reap with dry-run-default multi-provider sweeper. Add --apply / --include-orphans / --force-forget / --strict / --id / --format / --config flags. Ship human-table + JSONL output formats.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` (rewrite `_cmd_reap` around line 699; add `_emit_reap_human`, `_emit_reap_jsonl` helpers)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py` (rewrite reap subparser around line 147)
- Test: `tests/cli/test_cmd_reap.py` (new file, 10 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- kinoforge reap no flags → verdict table, no destruction, exit 0.
- --apply triggers actor loop with DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY.
- --include-orphans without --apply → exit 4 + stderr msg.
- --include-orphans with --apply → adds ORPHAN_REAP to policy.
- --force-forget without --apply → exit 4.
- --strict + UNROUTABLE/HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN present → exit 3.
- --id X restricts sweep to one ledger entry.
- --format json emits valid JSONL.
- Empty ledger → exit 0 + message.
- One action='failed' under --apply → exit 2.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_reap.py -v` → 10 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "tests/cli/test_cmd_reap.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_reap.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dry-run default", "--apply routes policy", "flag-combo validation", "--strict exit 3", "--id restricts", "--format json valid", "empty ledger handled", "failed action exit 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: kinoforge status verdict line
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface the same classify verdict in the existing key=value status block as verdict=<...>. Single source of truth for 'what would reap do to this entry?'

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` (_cmd_status around line 564 — add _classify_for_status helper, extend each provider_block construction)
- Modify: `tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py` (+2 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Entry has Layer U fields + provider returns id → verdict=LIVE (or whatever classify returns) on its own line.
- Registry has no factory → verdict=UNROUTABLE printed alongside provider_status=unknown.
- provider.list_instances() reports id absent → verdict=STALE_LEDGER.
- Layer U sentinel-staleness advisory line preserved.
- Existing _cmd_status exit codes from Layer S unchanged.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py -v -k status`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py -v -k status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["verdict=LIVE", "verdict=UNROUTABLE on UnknownAdapter", "verdict=STALE_LEDGER on KeyError", "Layer U advisory preserved", "Layer S exits unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: README + PROGRESS + example YAML + final gate + merge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the new operator surface, update progress trail, run the full pre-commit suite, and merge to main via --no-ff (operator-authorised).

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md` (add Reaping orphan pods section)
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` (Phase 37 / Layer V entry; update Single next action)
- Modify: `examples/configs/wan.yaml`, `examples/configs/hosted.yaml`, `examples/configs/diffusers.yaml`, `examples/configs/fal.yaml`, `examples/configs/local-fake.yaml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README has new section describing dry-run, --apply, --include-orphans, --force-forget, --strict, --format json, exit codes, sentinel-gate continuity with Layer U.
- PROGRESS.md Phase 37 entry with per-task SHAs.
- Each example YAML carries the same commented grace_after_session_s line near lifecycle block.
- pre-commit --all-files exits zero.
- pytest tests/ -q green with expected count.
- Merge commit references all per-task SHAs, closes PROGRESS:163.

**Verify:** `git log --oneline main..HEAD` shows per-task chain; `pixi run pytest tests/ -q` green on main.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md", "examples/configs/wan.yaml", "examples/configs/hosted.yaml", "examples/configs/diffusers.yaml", "examples/configs/fal.yaml", "examples/configs/local-fake.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files && pixi run pytest tests/ -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README section added", "PROGRESS Phase 37 entry", "5 YAMLs updated", "pre-commit green", "full suite green", "merge commit refs per-task SHAs"]}
```
